//: NetOps Tower — Performance Budgets and Thresholds
Review quarterly or after major feature additions

totalJS.description: Total JavaScript shipped to client (all chunks combined)

largestAsset.description: No single asset may exceed this

firstContentfulPaint.description: Time until first DOM content is painted

timeToInteractive.description: Time until the app is fully interactive

messageBatchInterval.description: Uptime updates are batched and sent at most every 100ms

maxBatchSize.description: Maximum updates per WebSocket message batch

maxDrawCalls.description: Maximum WebGL draw calls per frame

maxTriangles.description: Maximum rendered triangles at highest LOD

lodDistances.description: LOD transition distances in world units

heapBudget.description: Maximum JS heap size during gameplay
